args:
moraine_bin=''; old_ifs="$IFS"; IFS=:; for path_dir in $PATH; do case "$path_dir" in /*) candidate="$path_dir/moraine" ;; *) candidate="${path_dir:-.}/moraine"; if [ -x "$candidate" ] && [ ! -d "$candidate" ]; then IFS="$old_ifs"; { printf '%s
' 'moraine plugin launch error: binary_untrusted'; printf '%s
' 'Refusing to run a moraine executable resolved from a relative PATH entry.'; printf '%s
' 'Restart your agent harness from a trusted shell where moraine resolves to an absolute installed path.'; } >&2; exit 126; fi; continue ;; esac; if [ -x "$candidate" ] && [ ! -d "$candidate" ]; then moraine_bin="$candidate"; break; fi; done; IFS="$old_ifs"; if [ -z "$moraine_bin" ]; then { printf '%s
' 'moraine plugin launch error: binary_missing'; printf '%s
' 'The Moraine plugin requires the moraine CLI on PATH.'; printf '%s
' 'Install: uv tool install moraine-cli'; printf '%s
' 'Upgrade: uv tool upgrade moraine-cli'; printf '%s
' 'Start the stack before using MCP search: moraine up'; printf '%s
' 'If Moraine is already installed, restart your agent harness with its bin directory on PATH.'; } >&2; exit 127; fi; cwd="$(pwd -P 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; moraine_name="${moraine_bin##*/}"; moraine_parent="${moraine_bin%/*}"; moraine_dir="$(CDPATH= cd -- "$moraine_parent" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P || printf '%s
' "$moraine_parent")"; moraine_bin="$moraine_dir/$moraine_name"; scan_dir="$moraine_dir"; while [ "$scan_dir" != / ]; do if [ -e "$scan_dir/.git" ]; then { printf '%s
' 'moraine plugin launch error: binary_untrusted'; printf '%s
' 'Refusing to run a moraine executable from a Git worktree.'; printf '%s
' 'Restart your agent harness with the installed moraine CLI earlier on a trusted PATH.'; } >&2; exit 126; fi; scan_dir="${scan_dir%/*}"; if [ -z "$scan_dir" ]; then scan_dir=/; fi; done; case "$moraine_bin" in "$cwd"/*) { printf '%s
' 'moraine plugin launch error: binary_untrusted'; printf '%s
' 'Refusing to run a moraine executable from the current project directory.'; printf '%s
' 'Restart your agent harness with the installed moraine CLI earlier on a trusted PATH.'; } >&2; exit 126 ;; esac; exec "$moraine_bin" run mcp
